text:
お互いに磨き合って高め合うって
とってもいいことだと思わない？

特にスーパーハードともなると
そういう姿勢が大事だと思うんだー。

しーっかり呼吸を合わせて
Ｓランククリアしちゃおう！

Don't you think you and me trying to one up
each other is a great way for us to hone our
skills?

It's definitely something that helps out when
we're talking Super Hard quests, that's for
sure.

So! Speaking of that, why don't you and I sync
up and score us another S Rank together? I
won't take no for an answer!
